title: React app upload file
excerpt: Hi I have made a custom form using the react framework app on Monday.com. I have added a file upload field but I can’t seem to figure out how to upload a file to a column in a board. I looked through the API documentatio…

posts.author: alexHSM (Alex O'Connor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi I have made a custom form using the react framework app on Monday.com. I have added a file upload field but I can’t seem to figure out how to upload a file to a column in a board. I looked through the API documentation but it doesn’t explain it very well. Do I have to format the file in some way to upload it? Thank you any help is welcome.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Alex,

If this an app available via our apps marketplace? Can you please specify which one using a screenshot? I can’t seem to locate it in the marketplace
